name: Heavenly Chocolate Mousse Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper - KCXJ08A
Preparation Time: 1 hour
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 9-inch springform pan.
In a heavy saucepan, over low heat, combine the butter, first 5 ingredients (sugar and coffee) and cook, stirring, until melted. Remove from heat. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs. Stir into the chocolate mixture and pour into the prepared pan. Bake for 50-60 minutes. Serve at room temperature.
